case_title: KLEIN, MICHAEL VS COMMINS, BRENDA et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $379.94 FILED BY KLEIN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT COMMINS, BRENDA UNITED SERVICES AUTO ASS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO BRENDA COMMINS C/O UNITED SERVICES AUTO ASSOC RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLEIN, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMMINS, BRENDA UNITED SERVICES AUTO ASS. DENIED, NO EVIDENCE THAT THE DEFT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR DAMAGE TO PLFT'S CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
